item.title: Unable to Find Job, Man Decides to Go to Prison to Survive
item.description: A Russian man who failed to find a job to support himself decided that the best way to survive was to get arrested and sentenced to prison. The post U...

item.title: Teen Paper Plane Enthusiasts Break 2 Long-Standing World Records in Under Two Months
item.description: A team of teenage paper plane enthusiasts from China managed to set new world records for the longest distance and longest flight time for a paper pla...

item.title: Turkish Man Saves Himself from Chocking by Performing the Heimlich Maneuver on Himself
item.description: A Turkish healthcare professional used an office chair to perform the Heimlich maneuver on himself after choking on food. The post Turkish Man Saves H...

item.title: Italian Pilot Becomes First to Land Plane on a Moving Train
item.description: Dario Costa recently made aviation history after becoming the first pilot ever to land a plane on a moving train before taking off again. The post Ita...

item.title: Woman Receives Prison Time for Using Megaphone to Insult Neighbors at Night for Almost Two Years
item.description: A Taiwanese woman was recently sentenced to three months in jail for using a megaphone to hurl insults at neighbors late at night. The post Woman Rece...
